name: Punarnava
summary: Internal cross-linking supports Punarnava through compounds such as punarnavine.
description: Internal cross-linking supports Punarnava through compounds such as punarnavine.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: significant kidney disease or unstable electrolytes
interactions: use clinician review for high-dose extracts or chronic use.

sources.title: Clinical efficacy of Punarnava Mandura and Dhatri Lauha in the management of Garbhini Pandu (anemia in pregnancy)
